description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix job that runs on various operating systems (macOS-10.14, ubuntu-16.04, windows-2016) with different build systems (bazel, cmake), excluding the windows-2016 and bazel combination. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, run a prepare script, and then run a test script specific to the build system and OS.
